feedback.text: I think the Digital Fairness Act should also include video games. The act aims to adress the following: 1 unfair commercial practices related to dark patterns 2 misleading marketing by influencers 3 addictive design of digital products 4 unfair personalisation practices. All of these are currently present in the video game industry as we speak and as a digital, cultural works, they and us consumers deserve protection from companies seeking to erode our rights through unfair business practices such as: - withdrawing licenses from customers without notice or -predatory pricing with gambling mechanics that (referring to the addictive design stated in the summary of the Digital Fairness Act) Kind regards
